heading: Inks, glues, and other supplies furnished to other Government agencies: payment
label: 314 Inks, glues, and other supplies furnished to other Government agencies: payment
text: Inks, glues, and other supplies manufactured by the Government Publishing Office in connection with its work may be furnished to departments and other establishments of the Government upon requisition, and payment made from appropriations available.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 62 (; pt. I, § 1, ).June 30, 1932, ch. 31447 Stat. 397

Change of Name“Government Publishing Office” substituted for “Government Printing Office” in text on authority of , set out as a note preceding .section 1301(b) of Pub. L. 113–235section 301 of this title
